title: Makeup Organiser, 3 Tier Drawer, Cosmetics Organiser, Versatile Cosmetic Storage, Large Vanity Organiser, Dressing Table Organiser, Anti-Slip Design, Countertop Bathroom Storage, Clear
features: Extra Large Capacity：This makeup organiser is designed with practicality in mind. Featuring three spacious drawers and two open compartments, it offers ample storage space to hold a variety of items such as skincare bottles, facial masks, lipsticks, perfumes, and other beauty essentials. Each drawer opens smoothly and allows you to easily access and organize your daily makeup products, helping you maintain a clean and clutter-free dressing table.

Versatile Style：With its sleek and modern design, this makeup organiser blends effortlessly into various home decorating styles—from vintage to minimalist or even contemporary. As a bedroom accessory,whether placed on a vanity, dresser, or bathroom shelf, it adds a stylish touch to your space while enhancing organization.

Compact Yet Spacious:Measuring 12.5 inches in length, 6.9 inches in width, and 17.3 inches in height, this organiser is compact enough to fit comfortably on most countertops, dressers, or bathroom vanities, yet large enough to store all your daily beauty essentials. The thoughtful layout makes full use of vertical space, maximizing capacity without taking up unnecessary room.

Easy to Clean:Made from durable, high-quality plastic, this makeup storage organiser is built to last. Its smooth surface resists stains and dust. To clean, simply wipe with a damp cloth—no special tools or effort required.
Ideal Gift Choice:Whether it’s for Mother’s Day, Valentine’s Day, Christmas, a birthday, or just as a thoughtful surprise, this makeup organiser is a meaningful gift choice.
